mapper.select: /* OsstStatChkMapper.getErrCdList */ SELECT AA.ERR_CD , AA.ERR_CNT FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , ( SELECT RSLT_CD AS ERR_CD , COUNT(*) AS ERR_CNT FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE RSLT_CD NOT IN ('0000', 'N') AND REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE-1/24,'HH') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE,'HH') GROUP BY RSLT_CD ) AA WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.GRP_ID = 'MON0001' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND AA.ERR_CD = B.CD_VAL AND AA.ERR_CNT > TO_NUMBER(B.CD_DSC)

/* OsstStatChkMapper.getErrMsg */ SELECT RSLT_MSG ERR_MSG FROM ( SELECT RSLT_MSG, COUNT(*) CNT FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE-1/24,'HH') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE,'HH') AND RSLT_CD = #{errCd} GROUP BY RSLT_MSG ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
/* OsstStatChkMapper.getSendTargetInfo */ SELECT B.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'MON0000'
